standalone_quantization_tests.notes: Pure PyTorch implementation achieves ~88-89% accuracy for 4-bit and ~99.3% for 8-bit. These standalone tests bypass bitsandbytes incompatibility on Python 3.14.

assertions_verified: VAL-QUANT-011: Layer-wise loading memory efficiency for 70B model
VAL-QUANT-012: Prefetching effectiveness and VRAM target
layer_wise_memory_tests.notes: Simulated 70B model shows VRAM usage <4GB with 2-layer cache. Prefetching demonstrates async loading behavior.

assertions_verified: VAL-QUANT-012: Prefetching overlap metrics and buffer effectiveness
prefetching_behavior_tests.notes: Prefetching successfully overlaps I/O with computation. Time savings documented.
